subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Beloved! Grasp thou the hem of the Covenant, and become renowned throughout all regions for thy love of God, beneath the shade of the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت دوست دست بدامن میثاق زن و بمحبت الله شهره آفاق شو در سایه شجره
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
